description: Creates Google Workspace groups for admin roles, functional teams, departments, and custom purposes. Configures group settings (who can post, join, view) and provides group IDs for cross-module policy targeting.

risk_profile_effects.standard: All department groups enabled by default.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: All department groups enabled by default.
risk_profile_effects.strict: All department groups enabled by default.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your organization's security tier. Controls default behavior for department group creation. Most clients use 'standard'.

org_display_name.label: Organization Display Name
org_display_name.client_description: Your organization's display name. Used in group descriptions.

org_domain.label: Organization Domain
org_domain.client_description: Your primary domain (e.g., acmecorp.com). Used to construct group email addresses.

enable_department_groups.label: Enable Department Groups
enable_department_groups.client_description: Whether to create department-based groups. When enabled, each department in your list gets its own Google Group with appropriate settings.

departments.label: Department List
departments.client_description: The list of departments in your organization. Each department gets a Google Group (e.g., dept-engineering@acmecorp.com).

enable_contractor_group.label: Enable Contractor Group
enable_contractor_group.client_description: Whether to create a 'Contractors' group. Enable this if your organization manages contractor identities in Google Workspace.

enable_executive_group.label: Enable Executive Leadership Group
enable_executive_group.client_description: Whether to create an 'Executive Leadership' group for C-suite and VP-level users. This group is typically targeted by enhanced authentication policies.

custom_groups.label: Custom Groups
custom_groups.client_description: Any additional Google Groups your organization needs beyond the standard set. Provide a name and description for each.

examples.name: Project Alpha
examples.description: Cross-functional team for Project Alpha initiative

examples.name: Remote Workers
examples.description: Employees approved for permanent remote work

outputs.super_admins_id: Group ID for the Super Admins group
outputs.all_employees_id: Group ID for the All Employees group
outputs.contractors_id: Group ID for the Contractors group (null if disabled)
outputs.break_glass_id: Group ID for the Break Glass emergency access group
outputs.service_accounts_id: Group ID for the Service Accounts group
outputs.privileged_access_id: Group ID for the Privileged Access (JIT) group
outputs.executive_leadership_id: Group ID for the Executive Leadership group (null if disabled)
outputs.department_group_ids: Map of department name to Google Group ID
outputs.admin_group_ids: Map of admin role name to Google Group ID
outputs.all_group_ids: Combined map of all group names to Google Group IDs
